constraint.description: This Code Element should be removed from source code annotated by "@com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion".
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..]->(element), (element)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:OF_TYPE]->(:Type{fqn:"com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(major:Value{name:"major"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(minor:Value{name:"minor"}) WITH type, CASE WHEN element:Member THEN element END AS member, major, minor RETURN type as Type, member as Member, major.value as MajorVersion, minor.value as MinorVersion ORDER BY type.fqn, member.signature
